posts.body: Free favorites are waiting. Ready to order? With our new Starbucks Rewards program, you get benefits that feel more you. Three status levels give you personalized offers and new ways to enjoy free favorites. You still get your free birthday drink, plus fresh perks like Free Mod Monday each month. Join in and enjoy Rewards in every sip.

raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Breakfast restaurant, Cafe, Coffee store, Espresso bar, Internet cafe

reviews_data.review_text: I absolutely love this Starbucks! The baristas are always so nice and helpful, the line always moves super quick, and they never fail to make my drink right!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, we're sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: Usually have an amazing experience here…not so much this time. I ordered matcha with strawberry cream foam, the same as I always do. Today I didn’t notice the foam, and the barista tried to convince me that the foam was there I just couldn’t see it.
Mr Binkley had a good time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Perfect day for a coffee and outdoor seating. Had the Venti white chocolate mocha and chilled at a table outside. Service was great!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Employees are always so kind, and when there are long lines at the drive thru they get through it efficiently and quickly. There is another location super close but nothing beats Kingsley!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there! We're so glad you had a wonderful experience. Thanks for sharing it with us!
reviews_data.review_text: The Mancha Strawberry Frappacino is delicious. I got it with low fat milk. Great service. Please order more chocolate cake pops, they are hard to get  😋🍓🥤

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Best Starbucks I’ve visited in a long time! I receive the same friendly service and great drinks every time I visit from GA❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, we're sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: Nobody was behind me in the drive though and my daughtee decided last minute she wanted a drink they wouldn't even ring them up separately made me drive though the drive though again never in my life have a had such a bad experience!!!! Definitely wont be visiting this one again!!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: This was my second time visiting this establishment within 3 yrs (I come when visiting my sister) and not only was my two grande lattes made perfectly the customer service was EXCEPTIONAL. The employee at the drive-thru was extremely helpful and made sure my order was accurate prior to me driving away. It is not just the coffee that has me as a loyal customer but it is also the employees that take their time to ensure I get EXACTLY what I ordered with a smile & an AMAZING greeting. Thank you so much to the lady that worked Drive-thru Fri. 3/28/25 between noon & 5. This lady ROCKS!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, I'm sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: This location has gone down sooo much, they constantly get orders incorrect.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi John! We're beyond grateful for this positive feedback. Looking forward to making more 5-star experiences with you!
reviews_data.review_text: Very prompt & friendly service at the window. Thank you Sen!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, I'm sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: This location is so hit or miss. I typically order on the app pretty well in advance and wait for it to turn to ready to go, but it’s like a 5% chance my drink is actually ready when I get in there, despite the update on my order being “ready to go”. I feel like my drinks are rarely made correctly. The staff isn’t friendly at all.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there, I apologize for the long wait time you experienced. If you'd like to share additional details or feedback, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: SLOWEST ALWAYS A LINE STARBUCKS 🙄

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Nice quick service

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, I'm sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: Honestly I wouldn’t even waste my time going there, if you have to be somewhere in a timely matter they watch you walk in and just look at you they don’t greet you or anything I was picking up a delivery despite them being busy and have a full drive thru I sat there for about 15 minutes without being greeted or asked what the name of my order was, I tried to give them time to slow their rush down and actually pay attention to the customers in the lobby but still nothing so I finally asked one of the workers what was the eta on my pickup and he said is it delivery and I responded yes and he said oh it’s over there, mind you “over there” was way in the corner on the other side of the building not in customers view at all nor was there a sign specifying that delivery orders were to be picked up on that side instead of where the pickup sign is.I felt very frustrated having to sit there for almost 25 minutes and the order was sitting there the whole time, I just feel like if i would have been greeted shortly after walking in and asked what the name was all of this could have been avoided, I know for sure I won’t be back and hopefully I won’t have anymore orders to pick up there.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text:
Just a suggestion if there is a puppy in the vehicle they are aware that food comes from the drive-thru and wait eagerly... acknowledge their presence the driver should not have to ask for a pup cup.... consider appropriate sizes also i.e pomeranian vs bull mastiff ijs chuck will eat the
That lil cup and not even blink
Hello my name is Bandit. Came here for Brekkie w me kiddo Bluey. She enjoy a, what ya call a "muffin" and I had a sip of cuppa.

reviews_data.review_text: We visit this location frequently and they’re always friendly, efficient, and make orders well. Even if the drive thru line is long, it moves smoothly. Never had an issue!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jaimie! We're beyond grateful for this positive feedback. Looking forward to making more 5-star experiences with you!
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite Starbucks - super fast, friendly staff and my drink is always better here than when I order it at other stores.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, I'm sorry to hear about this but appreciate you for sharing your experience. If you'd like additional assistance from our team, please get in touch through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs)!
reviews_data.review_text: They clean the machines 2 hours before closing, so I couldn’t get a Pike coffee.
One of my go-to places to work from! The coffee is always delicious and service is amazing.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Love this Starbucks, is super clean and organized!!☕️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: #DoorDashing: A DoorDashing friendly location. Easy access to orders. Quick and efficient order fulfillment. Awesome decor and gregarious staff.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there! We're so glad you had a wonderful experience. Thanks for sharing it with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Great place to study!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Kayla! We're beyond grateful for this positive feedback. Looking forward to making more 5-star experiences with you!
reviews_data.review_text: Even if the line is long, you won’t have to wait very long! Everything is smooth and my order is always right! The customer service is also top tier everytime! The cashier Zoe is the sweetest! Even if you’re at the window waiting she will make small conversation and is just overall a delightful person! She’s one of the main reasons I always come to this location! Keep being awesome girl!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Kingsley just has that dark and inviting atmosphere of the 2000’s 2010’s coffee shop vibe that a lot of places are missing today. I always enjoy coming the this location because of their friendly staff and their ability to consistently make the orders of the best quality. The only downside is they are always if not busy so be patient. Anyways I love this Starbucks and their staff. 10/10!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: The drive-thru was quick & efficient.  Love that!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Caffeine makes me happy. They're always fast and courteous
Had better service and beverage elsewhere.   Not all starbucks are equal.
Waiting for the crew, my type of Happy Hour!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there! We're so glad you had a wonderful experience. Thanks for sharing it with us!
reviews_data.review_text: My FAVORITE starbies! I normally get a brown sugar, shaken espresso with oat milk, chai, brown sugar, and vanilla. They are the only ones that can make it correctly and it taste delicious! I do get hot coffee sometimes I did this morning, and I always ask for extra hot. This is the first Starbucks to ever get it extra hot for me. They always makes my drinks  phenomenal!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Leslie! We're beyond grateful for this positive feedback. Looking forward to making more 5-star experiences with you!
reviews_data.review_text: Love this location! Just left and saw one of my faves Gavin always makes me smile.
Friendly staff in a great location.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, thank you for sharing your experience. I’d love to hear more from you on how we can improve in the future. Please choose your preferred method of communication through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs) to share additional details and feedback.
reviews_data.review_text: Disappointed over a missed opportunity. I order from this Starbucks 4-5 times a week and it's not uncommon for them to make a mistake with my drink and I get a remake, no problem. This time my wife ordered the drink and brought it home for me and it was made incorrectly but the label was correct. I went back up there to get a remake and the cashier at the drive-thru was very nice, she apologized for the mistake and provided great customer service. I told her that it was an inconvenience for me to have to drive all the way back up there in the rain because they used dairy milk instead of oat milk. I asked her to ask the Manager if she would Comp/Credit my next drink for the inconvenience.  The Supervisor (Grace) told me that she could not comp the drink and remaking the drink  for "free" was the only resolution she could provide because they were not charging me for the remake. So I nicely explained to her that she was not giving me anything for "free".  I paid almost $8 for a drink that did not have what I paid extra for, and it also had something that I couldn't consume.  I just wanted to leave this review in hopes that the owner takes this as a learning experience to help this supervisor to learn better skills to provide great customer service.
Very nice place
The employees are so personable and my order is always right. A pleasure to get my coffee before working midnight. Keep up the great work

I have had a cold ,and I asked Erica what she would recommend, and she suggested a mint tea with honey in it. I ordered it and have been sipping on it for an hour. It is amazing and has soothed my sore throat. I can't be more grateful. Thank you so much. This is aside from the friendly and co.forting atmosphere that is produced here. I am able to write in peace.
Everything one expects from a Starbucks

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there! Thanks so much for leaving this review. I encourage you to share this feedback with the Starbucks Care team through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs) - we're always looking for ways to improve!
reviews_data.review_text:
I made a mobile order and went through drive through with 10 cars ahead of me. When I got to the order microphone my drink should have been ready as it was already after the time I was supposed to pick it up. The employees told me I would have to come in and wait or go back to the end of the drive through lane which was already at least another 10 cars deep. I asked why people could order at the microphone in the drive through and immediately get their drink.
Having two different systems (drive through and mobile ordering) complicates everything. The orders should come in the sequence it was ordered whether that is mobile or walk in or drive through. I canceled my order bc they said it would be a 30 minute wait for my mobile order.
Great staff and the keep their doors open
Courtney was so sweet and helpful
Just got a Carmel Moschiotto
Wonderful 😍😚😚😚😍

I walked in and ordered.  As I stood waiting,  I learned that the drive through and ice waters are the priority.   I'm still standing here after more than 5 min, no lie.  Still waiting, well, you get the idea...  stilllll waiting.   I'll stop now but I hope they finally get around to making my drink.

UPDATE:  Got my drink, they made it wrong and are remaking it now.

Clean, fast and friendly service.  Plenty of indoor and outdoor seating.  Great WiFi. Coffee ☕.  What else do you need?

Indoor seating on a Thursday was packed by 8:30am but there was still center seating available.
Fast but twice in two weeks I’ve gotten black iced coffee that they’ve watered down to go farther.
This location very often closed
Always really nice staff here and quick with your order. They seem to be able to get people in and out pretty quick even with a long line at this location!

Rep did not ask me what size drink I wanted a charged me for a larger size without my permission. When I brought it to her attention she did not apologize, nor offer to change it to size I wanted. Let it go to avoid being late for work.

After I arrived and got situated to work, I found there to be no working outlets on one entire side of the store. No signs were posted acknowledging that fact. Also, the wifi was out. There were no signs acknowledging that either. When I asked about the wifi, one of the staff suggested I move to Panera since their wifi was reliable.

Hi! I don’t usually leave reviews, but I’m honestly so disappointed in this starbucks. The employees are amazing and the drive through is so fast, but the actual shop itself is awful. Every time I go in there to do school work, there is no wifi and the outlets don’t work. I’ve told the workers a multiple times, but there seems to be no change. For a coffee shop to not be technology friendly is a big no no. Please, someone fix this.
Ordered a caramel brûlée latte and got my latte with no coffee in it at all! Had my son go in and grab it didn’t think I’d need to check for that
It's your normal starbucks.  Friendly staff and faster than the starbucks down the street in Baxter. Should probably remove the Wi-Fi portion in the description because it never works.
good coffee

This location seems like it’s never open. I attempted to order coffee 2 times this week. The first try was Thursday at 3:30 and nobody was there. The second attempt on a Saturday at 2 pm. Nobody would answer the order box and when I drove to the window two employees were in there and just stared at me.
What is the point of this location being here if they aren’t open. Also when they happen to be open I have encounter very rude staffing and my drinks are constantly made incorrectly or just taste very stale.

This location advertises that they are open until 7PM.

When this location first opened they were amazing. The staff was friendly. The lines were short. They made my drink perfect every time. Also I live in this shopping district so it’s super convenient to go to. I’m very disappointed in how this location has gone down hill.
Corporate Starbucks needs to step in here and rescue this location.
My favorite morning stop
I waited 30 minutes for a mobile order that I placed. No apology from staff.

Worst  customer service! I ordered an expresso macchiato , the person at the register didn’t know what it was so she said they had a caramel macchiato (not the same thing)… the barista made me a latte instead. I tried to explain to him what I actually wanted when the brilliant “manager” pour the latte in to a smaller cup and I was supposed to call it a day. AGAIN I explained what I wanted…. She gets on the headset and she’s probably complaining at me because they are all looking at me… needless to say I requested a refund! If the “manager” doesn’t know how to make one of the drinks on their menu, how do we expect anyone else in there to know!! Ugh DONT MESS WITH MY COFFEE!!
Don't put tickets in order. Took an hour to get our drinks and 15+ people after us got theirs first. Didn't do anything about it when I respectfully asked.
Great customer service, and they made the drinks correctly.
SLOW drive through, 30 minutes!!!
There's always way too much cream in the coffees we order, at least there's never much of a wait.

Rude, trashy staff, while waiting in line I overheard them talking rudely/profanely about customers. My coffee was a hot drink and it tasted like it was watered down. Save yourself time and visit the Starbucks .3 miles North on Market St.
Quick, fast service. Very friendly.
I got a coffee taste like old coffee that’s been sitting for a little bit they did not even fill it up all the way it looks like somebody took some sips the sad part is they was not busy at all 😞
Super fast. Best Starbucks ever for inside counter service.
The staff here is always so friendly. It's the customer service for me cause we are talking about coffee here. I need all of my fresh beans, ya hear me?! Now we can all have a great day 😉
Decent for a Starbucks.

I'm going to say it again because (coming from L.A. where baristas have gotten decidedly deadpan and humorless) I think it's worth mentioning that the young man who served me today in Fort Mill was friendly and nice. Also, I tried the "Impossible Breakfast Sandwich", at his suggestion, which uses a plant-based non-meat patty substituted for sausage.  And it was delicious.  Lastly, I got a vente ice water in one of those (not new anymore) sippie cups that I love, and, yes... Water is still free in America :-)
Good experience.

I've never actually been one to care for Starbucks, but because of the convenient location (I both live and work in Kingsley) and the FANTASTIC staff, I've become a regular. The drinks always taste better than any other location I go to, and the few times the staff make a mistake they're quick and kind to rectify it.  The dragon drinks in particular taste better here than, say, the Baxter location; I had to go to the other today since Kingsley's is temporarily closed, and the taste difference is DEFINITELY noticeable. It was a quick reminder why I usually only go to Kingsley's Starbucks instead of others!

I feel like those jumping here to complain about minor mistakes seem to forget that these are PEOPLE making our drinks and food, not robots, and they're doing their best! No one is perfect 100% of the time; as long as they fix it and make up for it, that's all that matters.
Remember, kindness doesn't cost a thing! ;)
Quick and exactly as ordered.  Perfect for lunch break.
A free coffee(veterans day) brought me here. Years ago Starbucks sold us on expensive burnt coffees. There are better coffees out there at lower prices. Black Rifle Coffee company comes to mind.
They make the perfect coffee anyway you want it!
The staff are always so nice
Good service...

This is my go-to place for morning espresso. I usually order ahead on the mobile app and it's almost always ready when I arrive a few minutes later. Drive-thru is usually fast as well. Quad shot over ice topped with cold foam. Delicious!
The coffee is hit or miss sometimes, but the staff are friendly and keeps me coming back.
Absolutely YUMMY....*** Carmel mochiato CLOUD****I was on ☁️ 9😉❤️ I've been ordering them wrong for years***Def add the CLOUD***
They make a great caramel macchiato
Very clean and quick service!
Always Starbucks
Great, friendly service, but better than that, they are efficient. I love my local Starbucks. They have ruined it for me, I can’t go anywhere else. Thank you

adorable location.  I ordered on the app based when I would get to the store, and the app telling me the length of wait time to prepare my beverage.  The white chocolate mochas were cold and had slime balls in them...maybe the white pearls turned to gel.  could not drink.  we were on a time crunch and did not have time to go back in the store.

Come on, it more than just coffee (if your not into that), there's breakfast,  snacks, a bakery and even Creme (non-coffee) based frappuccino and fruit (if they carry or didn't run out bananas) smoothie-like drinks.
Service is great. A little hard to get to, but a we'll run shop.
Not as cozy as some but perfect for its locale!
Bathrooms are not always kept well stocked.   But everything eff lse is good.
I visited today and got such a great coffee!! Richard helped me find vegan options with no problem at all. You rock Richard! Definitely will be back.Thank you!
Service was incredibly slow today, and it wasn't even that busy!! Kind of disappointed.
Nice outside seating, quick service
quick
Love there coffee
good
Spent 12 minutes in line for drive thru.  Even put car in park, it was that bad. Only maybe 7 cars total in line. Couldn’t even get out of line , didn’t order, absolutely ridiculous
Its just the right place, trust me !
When u walk into a bussiness the employees should speak and not be standing around on the phone and never make a customer feel like their not wanted
If you like Starbucks then I recommend this location. Friendly staff and the drinks were done  right.
They are extremely rude and act as if they're doing you a favor by serving you this is the Starbucks in Baxter I do not like it they're extremely rude I will never go back
Very clean establishment with friendly, prompt staff. Outlets for charging devices and plenty of table space!
Love Starbucks
Pricey but good quality
Exceptional service. Friendly staff.
Great shopping experience friendly staff  atmosphere
I've traveled cross country for years and have NEVER had a BETTER experience than this one here. If you're going through, STOP HERE!
Another well prepared Venti Iced Coffee.  Fast friendly service. Well done.
Nice location
Great staff, order mobile for in and out service.
Went here while travelling back from CLT. Quick service. JT was wonderful. Large hot nonfat mocha was great. Great bananas. Not too crowded. Roomy for a Starbucks in a strip mall. Will come back.
Good however long wait time when I was there
It's a starbucks

Starbucks will always reign supreme; but this particular location (though SUPER convenient to my workplace) generally gets my order wrong more times than none. I was super excited when this location opened due to the Baxter location being so congested, but I've been disappointed at the fact that I have to DC my order every time I stop by. The employees have never been rude about it, I must say; but for the money that's being spent - I expect accuracy, considering a sticker is placed on the cup and/or warm item.

Latte was a cup of coffee not espresso with warmed skum and no foam
Horrible $4.00
First time trying this location, the drive thru was very fast and made my drink perfect. Ask for extra dragon fruit yum❣️
With Starbucks, you can never go wrong!! I love the chicken caprese and having a grande iced caramel macchiato with extra caramel drizzle!! Definitely hits the spot! 🤤
Great experience.
My drink was great but there were about six flies crowding the main machine. Gross! I know some flies can't be helped, but that was even too much for me.
You'll pull up to this drive thro and it'll be 8 cars in line and your the 9th then you look up and you at the window already. FAST SERVICES
Yumm
I love doing the ordering from my app and it's always ready in just a few minutes when I go to pick it up
Friendly prompt. Good atmosphere
Good
Very courteous
Very friendly staff
the staff was rude and when my order was ready they just put it on side without telling me anything.and after 5 minutes they let me know that it was mine.Very disappointed.
Worst Place.. I came at 5:30AM this morning and I shouted like anything at the drive through. No responded. Tried to call the shop but noone is picking. Insane
Felt just like my favorite Starbucks in Pittsburgh
Great place for coffee break from office
The staff was awesome, but the WiFi was very slow and wonky compared to most Starbucks locations
Great location.  Extremely friendly staff, plenty of indoor and outdoor seating.
Nice Starbucks
The nices people and great coffee.

An awesome location, with lots of great seating and a fantastic atmosphere. I particularly enjoyed the spacious outdoor seating area. The only thing holding the last star back is the service. Though the staff was extremely friendly and polite, they seemed a bit detached and distracted. There didn't seem to be a senior staffer present, and mistakes/forgotten orders occurred.

Nonetheless, a great location!
Great service
Exactly what you'd expect from Starbucks great coffee fair prices clean free WiFi,
Called ahead.. My drink was ready. They had me in and out with a smile
Quick Friendly Service

Even if the service was bad (which it isn't), anything beats going to Starbucks in Baxter, on Johnston Rd, or in any of the surrounding Harris Teeter grocery stores. This Starbucks is awesome! O, and Kingsley is BEAUTIFUL!

Have visited this Starbucks many times since it opened. Very convenient to not have to deal with Baxter traffic as others have said. Upon ordering today, the barista was super rude. There was no one waiting in line. He took his time to take my order without apologizing and promptly left after I ordered without even waiting to accept my payment. Felt like he was doing me a favor.

Really beautiful location and not very busy!  So relieved not to have to go to Baxter anymore :-)  The only kink they seem to be working out still is the WiFi, it's not reliable in the outside seating area.
Friendly staff. Nice location. Highly recommend.
Best frappe I've ever had at a Starbucks!! Will definitely return!!

Great service - people friendly
Relaxing atmosphere
Awesome new Starbucks in Kingsley. Finally no longer have to make that left turn into the Baxter Starbucks. Perfect alternative to Baxter village Starbucks. The 5 am opening hour is awesome.

Definitely wont be visiting this one again!!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello! Thanks for taking the time to share this review. We appreciate you and look forward to having you back!
reviews_data.review_text: This was my second time visiting this establishment within 3 yrs (I come when visiting my sister) and not only was my two grande lattes made perfectly the customer service was EXCEPTIONAL. The employee at the drive-thru was extremely helpful and made sure my order was accurate prior to me driving away. It is not just the coffee that has me as a loyal customer but it is also the employees that take their time to ensure I get EXACTLY what I ordered with a smile & an AMAZING greeting. Thank you so much to the lady that worked Drive-thru Fri. 3/28/25 between noon & 5. This lady ROCKS!

reviews_data.review_text: Honestly I wouldn’t even waste my time going there, if you have to be somewhere in a timely matter they watch you walk in and just look at you they don’t greet you or anything I was picking up a delivery despite them being busy and have a full drive thru I sat there for about 15 minutes without being greeted or asked what the name of my order was, I tried to give them time to slow their rush down and actually pay attention to the customers in the lobby but still nothing so I finally asked one of the workers what was the eta on my pickup and he said is it delivery and I responded yes and he said oh it’s over there, mind you “over there” was way in the corner on the other side of the building not in customers view at all nor was there a sign specifying that delivery orders were to be picked up on that side instead of where the pickup sign is.I felt very frustrated having to sit there for almost 25 minutes and the order was sitting there the whole time, I just feel like if i would have been greeted shortly after walking in and asked what the name was all of this could have been avoided, I know for sure I won’t be back and hopefully I won’t have anymore orders to pick up there.

reviews_data.review_text: Kingsley just has that dark and inviting atmosphere of the 2000’s 2010’s coffee shop vibe that a lot of places are missing today. I always enjoy coming the this location because of their friendly staff and their ability to consistently make the orders of the best quality. The only downside is they are always if not busy so be patient. Anyways I love this Starbucks and their staff. 10/10!

reviews_data.review_text: My FAVORITE starbies! I normally get a brown sugar, shaken espresso with oat milk, chai, brown sugar, and vanilla. They are the only ones that can make it correctly and it taste delicious! I do get hot coffee sometimes I did this morning, and I always ask for extra hot. This is the first Starbucks to ever get it extra hot for me. They always makes my drinks  phenomenal!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, thank you for sharing your experience. I’d love to hear more from you on how we can improve in the future. Please choose your preferred method of communication through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs) to share additional details and feedback.
reviews_data.review_text: Disappointed over a missed opportunity. I order from this Starbucks 4-5 times a week and it's not uncommon for them to make a mistake with my drink and I get a remake, no problem. This time my wife ordered the drink and brought it home for me and it was made incorrectly but the label was correct. I went back up there to get a remake and the cashier at the drive-thru was very nice, she apologized for the mistake and provided great customer service. I told her that it was an inconvenience for me to have to drive all the way back up there in the rain because they used dairy milk instead of oat milk. I asked her to ask the Manager if she would Comp/Credit my next drink for the inconvenience.  The Supervisor (Grace) told me that she could not comp the drink and remaking the drink  for "free" was the only resolution she could provide because they were not charging me for the remake. So I nicely explained to her that she was not giving me anything for "free".  I paid almost $8 for a drink that did not have what I paid extra for, and it also had something that I couldn't consume.  I just wanted to leave this review in hopes that the owner takes this as a learning experience to help this supervisor to learn better skills to provide great customer service.
Very nice place
The employees are so personable and my order is always right. A pleasure to get my coffee before working midnight. Keep up the great work

I have had a cold ,and I asked Erica what she would recommend, and she suggested a mint tea with honey in it. I ordered it and have been sipping on it for an hour. It is amazing and has soothed my sore throat. I can't be more grateful. Thank you so much. This is aside from the friendly and co.forting atmosphere that is produced here. I am able to write in peace.
Everything one expects from a Starbucks

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi there! Thanks so much for leaving this review. I encourage you to share this feedback with the Starbucks Care team through our Contact Us page (https://sbux.co/3uW8Bbs) - we're always looking for ways to improve!
reviews_data.review_text:
I made a mobile order and went through drive through with 10 cars ahead of me. When I got to the order microphone my drink should have been ready as it was already after the time I was supposed to pick it up. The employees told me I would have to come in and wait or go back to the end of the drive through lane which was already at least another 10 cars deep. I asked why people could order at the microphone in the drive through and immediately get their drink.
Having two different systems (drive through and mobile ordering) complicates everything. The orders should come in the sequence it was ordered whether that is mobile or walk in or drive through. I canceled my order bc they said it would be a 30 minute wait for my mobile order.
Great staff and the keep their doors open
Courtney was so sweet and helpful
Just got a Carmel Moschiotto
Wonderful 😍😚😚😚😍

I walked in and ordered.  As I stood waiting,  I learned that the drive through and ice waters are the priority.   I'm still standing here after more than 5 min, no lie.  Still waiting, well, you get the idea...  stilllll waiting.   I'll stop now but I hope they finally get around to making my drink.

UPDATE:  Got my drink, they made it wrong and are remaking it now.

Clean, fast and friendly service.  Plenty of indoor and outdoor seating.  Great WiFi. Coffee ☕.  What else do you need?

Indoor seating on a Thursday was packed by 8:30am but there was still center seating available.
Fast but twice in two weeks I’ve gotten black iced coffee that they’ve watered down to go farther.
This location very often closed
Always really nice staff here and quick with your order. They seem to be able to get people in and out pretty quick even with a long line at this location!

Rep did not ask me what size drink I wanted a charged me for a larger size without my permission. When I brought it to her attention she did not apologize, nor offer to change it to size I wanted. Let it go to avoid being late for work.

After I arrived and got situated to work, I found there to be no working outlets on one entire side of the store. No signs were posted acknowledging that fact. Also, the wifi was out. There were no signs acknowledging that either. When I asked about the wifi, one of the staff suggested I move to Panera since their wifi was reliable.

Hi! I don’t usually leave reviews, but I’m honestly so disappointed in this starbucks. The employees are amazing and the drive through is so fast, but the actual shop itself is awful. Every time I go in there to do school work, there is no wifi and the outlets don’t work. I’ve told the workers a multiple times, but there seems to be no change. For a coffee shop to not be technology friendly is a big no no. Please, someone fix this.
Ordered a caramel brûlée latte and got my latte with no coffee in it at all! Had my son go in and grab it didn’t think I’d need to check for that
It's your normal starbucks.  Friendly staff and faster than the starbucks down the street in Baxter. Should probably remove the Wi-Fi portion in the description because it never works.
good coffee

This location seems like it’s never open. I attempted to order coffee 2 times this week. The first try was Thursday at 3:30 and nobody was there. The second attempt on a Saturday at 2 pm. Nobody would answer the order box and when I drove to the window two employees were in there and just stared at me.
What is the point of this location being here if they aren’t open. Also when they happen to be open I have encounter very rude staffing and my drinks are constantly made incorrectly or just taste very stale.

This location advertises that they are open until 7PM.

When this location first opened they were amazing. The staff was friendly. The lines were short. They made my drink perfect every time. Also I live in this shopping district so it’s super convenient to go to. I’m very disappointed in how this location has gone down hill.
Corporate Starbucks needs to step in here and rescue this location.
My favorite morning stop
I waited 30 minutes for a mobile order that I placed. No apology from staff.

Worst  customer service! I ordered an expresso macchiato , the person at the register didn’t know what it was so she said they had a caramel macchiato (not the same thing)… the barista made me a latte instead. I tried to explain to him what I actually wanted when the brilliant “manager” pour the latte in to a smaller cup and I was supposed to call it a day. AGAIN I explained what I wanted…. She gets on the headset and she’s probably complaining at me because they are all looking at me… needless to say I requested a refund! If the “manager” doesn’t know how to make one of the drinks on their menu, how do we expect anyone else in there to know!! Ugh DONT MESS WITH MY COFFEE!!
Don't put tickets in order. Took an hour to get our drinks and 15+ people after us got theirs first. Didn't do anything about it when I respectfully asked.
Great customer service, and they made the drinks correctly.
SLOW drive through, 30 minutes!!!
There's always way too much cream in the coffees we order, at least there's never much of a wait.

Rude, trashy staff, while waiting in line I overheard them talking rudely/profanely about customers. My coffee was a hot drink and it tasted like it was watered down. Save yourself time and visit the Starbucks .3 miles North on Market St.
Quick, fast service. Very friendly.
I got a coffee taste like old coffee that’s been sitting for a little bit they did not even fill it up all the way it looks like somebody took some sips the sad part is they was not busy at all 😞
Super fast. Best Starbucks ever for inside counter service.
The staff here is always so friendly. It's the customer service for me cause we are talking about coffee here. I need all of my fresh beans, ya hear me?! Now we can all have a great day 😉
Decent for a Starbucks.

I'm going to say it again because (coming from L.A. where baristas have gotten decidedly deadpan and humorless) I think it's worth mentioning that the young man who served me today in Fort Mill was friendly and nice. Also, I tried the "Impossible Breakfast Sandwich", at his suggestion, which uses a plant-based non-meat patty substituted for sausage.  And it was delicious.  Lastly, I got a vente ice water in one of those (not new anymore) sippie cups that I love, and, yes... Water is still free in America :-)
Good experience.

I've never actually been one to care for Starbucks, but because of the convenient location (I both live and work in Kingsley) and the FANTASTIC staff, I've become a regular. The drinks always taste better than any other location I go to, and the few times the staff make a mistake they're quick and kind to rectify it.  The dragon drinks in particular taste better here than, say, the Baxter location; I had to go to the other today since Kingsley's is temporarily closed, and the taste difference is DEFINITELY noticeable. It was a quick reminder why I usually only go to Kingsley's Starbucks instead of others!

I feel like those jumping here to complain about minor mistakes seem to forget that these are PEOPLE making our drinks and food, not robots, and they're doing their best! No one is perfect 100% of the time; as long as they fix it and make up for it, that's all that matters.
Remember, kindness doesn't cost a thing! ;)
Quick and exactly as ordered.  Perfect for lunch break.
A free coffee(veterans day) brought me here. Years ago Starbucks sold us on expensive burnt coffees. There are better coffees out there at lower prices. Black Rifle Coffee company comes to mind.
They make the perfect coffee anyway you want it!
The staff are always so nice
Good service...

This is my go-to place for morning espresso. I usually order ahead on the mobile app and it's almost always ready when I arrive a few minutes later. Drive-thru is usually fast as well. Quad shot over ice topped with cold foam. Delicious!
The coffee is hit or miss sometimes, but the staff are friendly and keeps me coming back.
Absolutely YUMMY....*** Carmel mochiato CLOUD****I was on ☁️ 9😉❤️ I've been ordering them wrong for years***Def add the CLOUD***
They make a great caramel macchiato
Very clean and quick service!
Always Starbucks
Great, friendly service, but better than that, they are efficient. I love my local Starbucks. They have ruined it for me, I can’t go anywhere else. Thank you

adorable location.  I ordered on the app based when I would get to the store, and the app telling me the length of wait time to prepare my beverage.  The white chocolate mochas were cold and had slime balls in them...maybe the white pearls turned to gel.  could not drink.  we were on a time crunch and did not have time to go back in the store.

Come on, it more than just coffee (if your not into that), there's breakfast,  snacks, a bakery and even Creme (non-coffee) based frappuccino and fruit (if they carry or didn't run out bananas) smoothie-like drinks.
Service is great. A little hard to get to, but a we'll run shop.
Not as cozy as some but perfect for its locale!
Bathrooms are not always kept well stocked.   But everything eff lse is good.
I visited today and got such a great coffee!! Richard helped me find vegan options with no problem at all. You rock Richard! Definitely will be back.Thank you!
Service was incredibly slow today, and it wasn't even that busy!! Kind of disappointed.
Nice outside seating, quick service
quick
Love there coffee
good
Spent 12 minutes in line for drive thru.  Even put car in park, it was that bad. Only maybe 7 cars total in line. Couldn’t even get out of line , didn’t order, absolutely ridiculous
Its just the right place, trust me !
When u walk into a bussiness the employees should speak and not be standing around on the phone and never make a customer feel like their not wanted
If you like Starbucks then I recommend this location. Friendly staff and the drinks were done  right.
They are extremely rude and act as if they're doing you a favor by serving you this is the Starbucks in Baxter I do not like it they're extremely rude I will never go back
Very clean establishment with friendly, prompt staff. Outlets for charging devices and plenty of table space!
Love Starbucks
Pricey but good quality
Exceptional service. Friendly staff.
Great shopping experience friendly staff  atmosphere
I've traveled cross country for years and have NEVER had a BETTER experience than this one here. If you're going through, STOP HERE!
Another well prepared Venti Iced Coffee.  Fast friendly service. Well done.
Nice location
Great staff, order mobile for in and out service.
Went here while travelling back from CLT. Quick service. JT was wonderful. Large hot nonfat mocha was great. Great bananas. Not too crowded. Roomy for a Starbucks in a strip mall. Will come back.
Good however long wait time when I was there
It's a starbucks

Starbucks will always reign supreme; but this particular location (though SUPER convenient to my workplace) generally gets my order wrong more times than none. I was super excited when this location opened due to the Baxter location being so congested, but I've been disappointed at the fact that I have to DC my order every time I stop by. The employees have never been rude about it, I must say; but for the money that's being spent - I expect accuracy, considering a sticker is placed on the cup and/or warm item.

Latte was a cup of coffee not espresso with warmed skum and no foam
Horrible $4.00
First time trying this location, the drive thru was very fast and made my drink perfect. Ask for extra dragon fruit yum❣️
With Starbucks, you can never go wrong!! I love the chicken caprese and having a grande iced caramel macchiato with extra caramel drizzle!! Definitely hits the spot! 🤤
Great experience.
My drink was great but there were about six flies crowding the main machine. Gross! I know some flies can't be helped, but that was even too much for me.
You'll pull up to this drive thro and it'll be 8 cars in line and your the 9th then you look up and you at the window already. FAST SERVICES
Yumm
I love doing the ordering from my app and it's always ready in just a few minutes when I go to pick it up
Friendly prompt. Good atmosphere
Good
Very courteous
Very friendly staff
the staff was rude and when my order was ready they just put it on side without telling me anything.and after 5 minutes they let me know that it was mine.Very disappointed.
Worst Place.. I came at 5:30AM this morning and I shouted like anything at the drive through. No responded. Tried to call the shop but noone is picking. Insane
Felt just like my favorite Starbucks in Pittsburgh
Great place for coffee break from office
The staff was awesome, but the WiFi was very slow and wonky compared to most Starbucks locations
Great location.  Extremely friendly staff, plenty of indoor and outdoor seating.
Nice Starbucks
The nices people and great coffee.

An awesome location, with lots of great seating and a fantastic atmosphere. I particularly enjoyed the spacious outdoor seating area. The only thing holding the last star back is the service. Though the staff was extremely friendly and polite, they seemed a bit detached and distracted. There didn't seem to be a senior staffer present, and mistakes/forgotten orders occurred.

Nonetheless, a great location!
Great service
Exactly what you'd expect from Starbucks great coffee fair prices clean free WiFi,
Called ahead.. My drink was ready. They had me in and out with a smile
Quick Friendly Service

Even if the service was bad (which it isn't), anything beats going to Starbucks in Baxter, on Johnston Rd, or in any of the surrounding Harris Teeter grocery stores. This Starbucks is awesome! O, and Kingsley is BEAUTIFUL!

Have visited this Starbucks many times since it opened. Very convenient to not have to deal with Baxter traffic as others have said. Upon ordering today, the barista was super rude. There was no one waiting in line. He took his time to take my order without apologizing and promptly left after I ordered without even waiting to accept my payment. Felt like he was doing me a favor.

Really beautiful location and not very busy!  So relieved not to have to go to Baxter anymore :-)  The only kink they seem to be working out still is the WiFi, it's not reliable in the outside seating area.
Friendly staff. Nice location. Highly recommend.
Best frappe I've ever had at a Starbucks!! Will definitely return!!

Great service - people friendly
Relaxing atmosphere
Awesome new Starbucks in Kingsley. Finally no longer have to make that left turn into the Baxter Starbucks. Perfect alternative to Baxter village Starbucks. The 5 am opening hour is awesome.
